name: Policy-not-found: route on how the caller responds
description: Prefix drives the caller through safety + a policy number that fails to verify (cap_verify_policy mock = not_found), landing in flow_policy_not_found ('I'm not finding that policy'). Each branch is a different caller response; we check it routes to retry vs. human vs. give-up (flow_policy_not_found.exit_paths). The shared prefix is replayed once per branch.
prefix_turns: Pat Lin, policy one two three four five.

branches.user_input: Oh wait, maybe it's one two three four six?
branches.notes: corrected number, not yet retried -> xp_pnf_retry back to flow_identify.

branches.user_input: Just put me through to a real person, please.
branches.notes: wants a person -> xp_pnf_human fires cap_transfer_to_human. The transfer can be a silent tool call with no narration, so we assert the agent did NOT keep looping on the number or fabricate a claim, rather than a specific phrase; a native runner verifies the capability call itself.

branches.user_input: You know what, forget it, I'll call back later.
